semantic.role: Vitest test suite for getGlobalArchSpineDir — validates the platform-specific resolution of the global ArchSpine configuration directory across win32, darwin, and linux.
responsibilities: Tests that on win32 with SPINE_HOME set returns that path.
Tests that on win32 without SPINE_HOME falls back to process.env.LOCALAPPDATA or path.join(os.homedir(), '.config').
Tests that on darwin with XDG_CONFIG_HOME set returns that path.
Tests that on darwin without XDG_CONFIG_HOME falls back to path.join(os.homedir(), '.config').
Tests that on linux with XDG_CONFIG_HOME set returns that path.
Tests that on linux without XDG_CONFIG_HOME falls back to path.join(os.homedir(), '.config').
Restores the original platform and environment variables after each test via afterEach.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide automated validation that the global directory resolver behaves correctly on each major OS, ensuring deterministic configuration lookup.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent changes indicated beyond the test suite itself.
